description_long: This is a large, multi-functional wooden desk with an integrated hutch and storage compartments. The main structure is composed of light wood panels with a natural grain, accented by white horizontal bands on the front and sides. The upper section features open shelving, two cabinets with doors, and smaller cubby spaces for organization. The lower section includes a spacious work surface, a set of three drawers on the right, and a single-door cabinet on the left, all equipped with small handles. The desk is supported by sturdy legs and appears to have small wheels or glides for mobility. The overall design is modern and practical, suitable for use in offices, home workspaces, or public study areas.
description: A large, modern wooden desk with a hutch, multiple shelves, cabinets, and drawers, featuring light wood and white accents. It offers ample storage and workspace, ideal for office or study environments.
description_view_0: The front view shows the white accent band, the open space beneath the hutch, and the lower storage compartments.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the desk and the layered structure of the hutch and work surface.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the open shelving, cabinet doors, drawers, and the full workspace layout.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the hutch, desk, and storage units.
